body:
**Context**

File is 9,466 lines. 175 hook calls. `TraceTab` alone is 1,700 lines / 59 hooks. The "single-file for Claude.ai artifact" constraint may no longer apply once Pages is the primary deployment.

**TODO**

Proceed with caution.

First decide whether the single-file constraint is live. If no:
- `src/components/primitives.jsx` — `Panel`, `Stat`, `Pill`, `DyeChip`, `Field`, `ToolButton`
- `src/lib/abif.js` — ABIF parser, LIZ calibration, trace peak caller
- `src/lib/preprocess.js` — Savitzky-Golay, baseline, detrend, smoothing stack
- `src/lib/biology.js` — `CONSTRUCT`, `DYE_*`, `ASSEMBLY_PRODUCTS`, `findGrnas`, `predictCutProducts`, `classifyPeaks`, `LAB_GRNA_CATALOG`
- `src/lib/export.js` — SVG / PNG / JPG / WebP / combined-SVG export helpers + CSV
- `src/lib/viewstate.js` — `encodeViewState` / `decodeViewState`
- `src/tabs/TraceTab.jsx` (with its own sub-splits — `EndStructureEditor`, `PostTailingPanel`, `StackedChromatogram` can each be their own file), `PeakIdTab.jsx`, `CutPredictionTab.jsx`, `AutoClassifyTab.jsx`, `CompareTab.jsx`, `HeatmapTab.jsx`
- `src/FragmentViewer.jsx` — top-level component + `<DropOverlay>` + wiring only

If yes (Claude.ai artifact mode still primary): at least move the Python-side skills (`cas9-cut-predictor`, `clc-visualizations`, `genemapper-parser`) to document that the JSX is deliberately monolithic and link to `BIOLOGY.md`-style sub-docs for navigation.

**Acceptance**

No single file > 2000 lines. Tests still pass, and no functionalities are broken. `FragmentViewer.jsx` imports what it needs, and the scaffold / build-artifact pipeline is either retired or updated to operate on the entry point.
title: [refactor] [big] Split `FragmentViewer.jsx`

body:
**Context**

446K PNG in a git-tracked examples folder. Larger than the JSX file before the inlined data literal. File exists at 456,017 bytes (446 KB). Other PNGs in the same dir: construct.png (30K), cut_diagram.png (38K), electropherogram_V059_3-2.png (73K), ssdna_products.png (41K). Total dir: ~638K.

**TODO**

Re-export at 2× or 4× instead of 8×, or move all five example images to a GitHub release / wiki / Git LFS.

**Acceptance**

`skills/clc-visualizations/examples/` is under ~100K total, or moved out of regular tracking.
title: [hygiene] Shrink `skills/clc-visualizations/examples/electropherogram_V059_3-2_with_species.png`

body:
### `#15` — ARCHITECTURE.md is out of date · `P2` `docs`



**Context**
ARCHITECTURE.md line 44 says "five tabs"; code has six (Sidebar definition at lines 4282-4287: `trace`, `peakid`, `cutpred`, `autoclass`, `compare`, `heatmap`). Tab table line numbers are off by thousands. 12 test files exist in `tests/`. Inline comment at line 2918 reads `// "trace" | "peakid" | "compare"` — only lists 3 of 6 values. Line 2917 inline comment `// "trace" | "peakid" | "compare"` is also stale.

**TODO**

- Add the sixth tab row.
- Replace hardcoded line numbers with `grep "^function TabName"` instructions.
- Expand tests tree, or just say "`tests/` — 12 vitest files, 139 tests."
- Fix the inline tab-state comment.

**Acceptance**

ARCHITECTURE.md navigates a reader to the right area on v0.22.2 code.
title: [docs] ARCHITECTURE.md is out of date

body:
**Context**

CHANGELOG ends at v0.7.0; package.json + README say v0.22.2. 15 versions worth of changes undocumented. Features added after v0.7 (Heatmap tab, Report modal, FSA in-browser ingest, DNA diagrams modal, post-tailing panel, peak-shift analysis, purity scores, cross-dye summary, colorblind palettes, URL view state) are mentioned in README but have no CHANGELOG provenance.

**TODO**

- `git log v0.7.0..HEAD --oneline` → one-liner per meaningful commit grouped into version buckets.
- Decide if versions 0.8-0.22.2 had meaningful dividing lines or if they were all one long feature push; if the latter, collapse to "v0.8.0 → v0.22.2: feature drop notes" and move on.
- Add a pre-release checklist to CONTRIBUTING.md: "bump package.json + CHANGELOG entry + README version line in one commit."

**Acceptance**

CHANGELOG current through v0.22.2; CONTRIBUTING has the checklist.
title: [docs] CHANGELOG.md fell off around v0.7

body:
**Context**

`export function classifyPeaks(sampleData, constructSeq, targetStart, targetEnd, constructSize, componentSizes, assemblyProducts, grnaCatalog, dyeOffsets, heightThreshold, matchTol, clusterTol, overhangsToConsider)`. Error-prone at call sites, especially when one middle argument is optional.

**TODO**

Convert to `classifyPeaks({ sampleData, construct, gRNAs, catalog, offsets, thresholds, overhangs })` or similar. Update all callers and tests.

**Acceptance**

Function takes one options object; tests pass; call sites are shorter and order-independent.
title: [refactor] `classifyPeaks` takes 13 positional args

body:
**Context**

One-shot bootstrap that has already run. It also writes an out-of-date `.gitignore` heredoc that, if re-run, would clobber the real `.gitignore` (missing `.vite/`, `coverage/`, `package-lock.json`).

**TODO**

`git rm scripts/init_repo.sh`. Update `docs/CONTRIBUTING.md` if it references the script.

**Acceptance**

File is gone; no dangling references.
title: [hygiene] Delete `scripts/init_repo.sh`
